Notice Of Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production, Set Two
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
William Manning, Esq. (925-687-4162; wmanning@vanlevylaw.com) of Van De Poel, Levy, Thomas, Arneal LLP for Plaintiffs.
Jodie Steinberg, Esq. (650-592-5400) of Coddington, Hicks & Danforth for Defendants.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTS WHEELS UP PARTNERS, LLC and GAMA AVIATION, LLC's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Requests For Production, Set Two is granted in part. It does not appear to be disputed that Plaintiff was suffering from and treating for pre-existing injuries suffered as a result of the prior accident. This would seem to make information about that UIM arbitration relevant to the subject matter. To the extent that documents were produced as a result of prior subpoenas, Plaintiff should not need to reproduce additional copies of the same documents so long as appropriate reference to those documents are set forth in the supplemental response. Plaintiffs to provide Certified Shorthand Reporter's contact information to Defendants. Defendant to order/purchase transcript from court reporter. Plaintiff has 10 days max to review transcript.

Counsel for Defendant to prepare a proposed order repeating the substantive portion of the court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312 and email it to rkane1089@aol.com.

Judge Pro Tem: Robert Kane, Clerk: S. Le, Not reported. =(302/JPT)
